	ReadPC { dst: Discard, increment: true }
		A:00 X:00 Y:00 P:24 SP:00
			Read Memory[0000] = 00
	YieldClock
		A:00 X:00 Y:00 P:24 SP:00

DecodedOpcode { sequence: Immediate, operation: Xor, index: None }
	CopyRegister { dst: AddrLow, src: PCLow }
		A:5F X:00 Y:00 P:6C SP:FB
	CopyRegister { dst: AddrHigh, src: PCHigh }
		A:5F X:00 Y:00 P:6C SP:FB
	IncrementRegister16 { dst: PC }
		A:5F X:00 Y:00 P:6C SP:FB
	RunOperation
		A:5F X:00 Y:00 P:6C SP:FB
	ReadAddress { dst: Tmp }
		A:5F X:00 Y:00 P:6C SP:FB
			Read Memory[C8EE] = AA
	AluBinaryOp { op: Xor, operand: Tmp }
		A:F5 X:00 Y:00 P:EC SP:FB
	FinishInstruction
		A:F5 X:00 Y:00 P:EC SP:FB
